name: WHO Prequalification
overview: The World Health Organization Prequalification Programme works to ensure that medicines, vaccines, in-vitro diagnostics and other health products supplied by international procurement agencies meet acceptable standards of quality, safety and efficacy.

name: Uppsala Monitoring Centre
overview: Uppsala Monitoring Centre is a WHO Collaborating Centre providing global pharmacovigilance services and tools.

name: SEARN Secretariat
overview: SEARN Secretariat provides coordination, guidance, and training support across member regulatory agencies.

name: USP
overview: USP advances public health by setting quality standards for medicines, dietary supplements and food ingredients.

name: PIC/S
overview: PIC/S is a non-binding, informal cooperative arrangement between regulatory authorities in the field of GMP.

name: Swissmedic
overview: Swissmedic is the Swiss Agency for Therapeutic Products responsible for authorisation and supervision of medicines.
